description: 4.5V to 72V, 2A, DC/DC Synchronous Step-Down Regulator with Internal Compensation and Programmable Frequency

1.name: PGND
1.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

13.name: PGND
13.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

14.name: PGND
14.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

15.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

16.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

18.name: PGND
18.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

19.name: PGND
19.description: Power ground. Connected to the source of the integrated low-side FET.

2.name: SW
2.description: Phase node of the regulator. Connected to the source of the high-side FET and the drain of the low-side FET.

3.name: VIN
3.description: Power supply input. Connected to the drain of the integrated high-side FET and input of internal linear regulator.

12.name: VIN
12.description: Power supply input. Connected to the drain of the integrated high-side FET and input of internal linear regulator.

20.name: VIN
20.description: Power supply input. Connected to the drain of the integrated high-side FET and input of internal linear regulator.

4.name: BST
4.description: Bootstrap circuit supply pin. Connect to SW with a capacitor to provide bias for the high-side FET gate driver.

5.name: EBIAS
5.description: Auxiliary internal linear regulator input. Can be connected to the output of the regulator to provide bias for the IC.

6.name: FB
6.description: Inverting input of the feedback error amplifier. Connected to a resistor divider from VOUT to ground.

7.name: AGND
7.description: Analog ground of the IC. Connect to the PCB ground plain.

8.name: PG
8.description: Open-drain power-good output. Can be pulled up with a resistor to VCC or a digital rail.

9.name: FS
9.description: Switching frequency setting pin. Connect a resistor to ground to set frequency from 200 kHz to 800 kHz.

10.name: VCC
10.description: Output of internal linear regulators. Provides bias for the IC including gate driver. Connect to ground with a decoupling capacitor.

11.name: EN
11.description: Enable pin. High voltage tolerant and can be directly connected to VIN.

11.name: SS
11.description: Soft-start time configuration. Connect a capacitor to ground to program soft-start time.

PAD.name: PAD
PAD.description: Bottom thermal pad. Should be connected to the AGND and to the PCB ground plain with thermal vias.
